completion_summary: Consolidated the canonical current-surface registry and project positioning; removed 17 verified-redundant worktrees, 76 redundant local branches, generated caches, and unused PNG previews; archived two orphan diagnostics byte-for-byte; preserved frozen and raw evidence. Ruff, mypy, targeted tests, and strict docs passed. The full suite reached 1782 passed and 14 skipped while exposing three pre-existing stale evidence-binding groups, now recorded as explicit blockers rather than re-signed in place.
notes: Cleanup is evidence-preserving: protocol-bound source, raw experiment evidence, private artifacts, remote branches, and the user-modified notebook remain out of destructive scope.
scope: Consolidate current versus historical repository surfaces, remove verified generated redundancy, archive orphan diagnostics, and clean stale local Git workspaces without altering frozen evidence.
